items.name_en: Loewe Puzzle. The woven handle is distinctive and unforgettable.
items.name_cn:
Loewe Puzzle. The woven handle is distinctive and unforgettable.
Model 3001A
Made from imported Spanish calfskin 🐄, it is soft and supple. The precise cutting allows it to fold naturally, suitable for hand-carry or crossbody (multiple uses). Detachable long shoulder strap. Textile lining, Small 24-14-11

items.name_en: Loewe's latest Flamenco Tote [Black and Red]
items.name_cn:
Loewe's latest Flamenco Tote [Black and Red]
Dimensions: 30cm length - 11.5cm base width - 38cm height
The design is eye-catching, with a harmonious and bright color combination.
Perfect for carrying a laptop, A4 files, and daily essentials to work. Large capacity and stylish.
A unique single-shoulder bag with smooth lines that looks elegant when worn. Suitable for both casual wear and dresses. The shoulder strap is adjustable for multiple carrying styles.
Made of ultra-fine Nappa leather with a matte leather interior, it feels very comfortable to the touch. The hardware also has a premium feel, a delight for detail lovers~^_^

items.name_en: Loewe🌟 Mini grainy cowhide Puzzle Handbag🌟
items.name_cn:
Loewe🌟 Mini grainy cowhide Puzzle Handbag🌟
First appearance tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of classic cowhide🌟The mini Puzzle can hold, for example, a small vertical wallet, most sizes of phones (max 6.1 inches) and a sunglasses case, worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*One internal slip pocket and one external zip pocket at the back*Cowhide zip pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
model:061838

specs.rawTitle:
Loewe🌟 Mini grainy cowhide Puzzle Handbag🌟
First appearance tote*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines*This mini version is made of classic cowhide🌟The mini Puzzle can hold, for example, a small vertical wallet, most sizes of phones (max 6.1 inches) and a sunglasses case, worn on the shoulder or crossbody*Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap*One internal slip pocket and one external zip pocket at the back*Cowhide zip pull*Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing🌟
size:18*12.5*8CM
model:061838

items.name_en: Loewe🌟 New Version 🆕 New Arrival Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Belt Bag🌟
items.name_cn:
Loewe🌟 New Version 🆕 New Arrival Small Classic Calfskin Puzzle Belt Bag🌟
*The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines. This small belt bag is made of classic calfskin, featuring overlapping edges. Can be worn on the shoulder or crossbody*
*Adjustable shoulder strap with metal buckle closure, engraved with LOEWE logo*
*Zipper closure, calfskin zipper pull*
*External zip pocket and internal slip pocket*
*One external zip pocket*
*Herringbone cotton canvas lining*
*Anagram embossed🌟
size:24*16*10.5
Model: 062344

items.name_en: LOEWE🌟New Arrival Medium Nappa Leather Featherlight Puzzle Handbag. A rectangular silhouette defined by distinctive geometric lines. Soft, lightweight Nappa leather lends a casual, relaxed vibe. This version features a shoulder strap, injecting new vitality into the design.
items.name_cn:
LOEWE🌟New Arrival Medium Nappa Leather Featherlight Puzzle Handbag. A rectangular silhouette defined by distinctive geometric lines. Soft, lightweight Nappa leather lends a casual, relaxed vibe. This version features a shoulder strap, injecting new vitality into the design.
*Removable and adjustable shoulder strap with rotating buckle
*Zipper closure, articulated zipper pull
*One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket
*Removable LOEWE hot-stamped or silver-plated label, featuring a hidden pocket and a balloon die
*Rectangular metal studs
*Nappa leather lining
*Anagram embossing, LOEWE engraved on the interior plaque
Model: 062608
Size: 29*12*19.5cm

items.name_en: Loє🌟wє Puzzle 660
items.name_cn:
Loє🌟wє Puzzle 660
Brown mixed with brown-yellow small size~
🧱Synchronized with the latest cabinet style
❤️Synchronized with the latest version from the counter, size 24-14-11CM, large capacity, perfect for daily wear and trips!
❤️A color you won't regret buying. 2019 synchronized with the latest counter style. No interface, full leather lining, thin shoulder strap, no studs at the bottom. Made of imported Spanish calfskin 🐄, soft and comfortable to the touch. Precise cutting allows it to fold naturally, can be carried by hand or slung over the shoulder (multiple uses). Removable long shoulder strap, textile lining. Practical, feels great to use! ❤️💋👩👩❤️💋👩👩❤️💋👩
❤️High-end exclusive private custom hardware, calfskin, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship
